prompt: Create one vertical smartphone-friendly scene illustration for a serial web novel. Do not render any readable text, chapter numbers, talk labels, section labels, captions, subtitles, logos, or UI overlays inside the image. Story context: 第3章　朝を持ち帰る / 第2話　汗が引くまで. Scene focus: 第2節　朝食の湯気 / セラパート. Summary: その数分前、共用廊下では宅配員を装った男が解錠端末を片手にインターホンへ触れ、屋上側ではもう一人がベランダへ渡す細いラインを準備していた。玄関が開かなければベランダ、ベランダが… Key beats: その数分前、共用廊下では宅配員を装った男が解錠端末を片手にインターホンへ触れ、屋上側ではもう一人がベランダへ渡す細いラインを準備していた。玄関が開かなければベランダ、ベランダが無理なら玄関。標的が走り終わって気を抜く時間帯を狙った、最後の侵入工作である。執拗だが、執拗なだけで工夫は浅い。 セラは隣棟の非常階段からその二手を見て、呼吸だけをひとつ整えた。猫耳カチューシャ型の警護支援ユニットが返す位置情報は明瞭だった。廊下側が先、屋上側はそのあとで間に合う。 「朝食の時間まで邪魔するんですか」 宅配員役が解錠端末を差し込む直前、セラの手がその手首を払った。端末だけを抜き取り、反転した肘を壁へ預けさせる。声が出る前に頸動脈の横へ浅く打ち込み、男を眠らせる。次の瞬間には非常階段を蹴って屋上側へ上がり、ラインを張ろうとしていた支援役の足首を払った。柵へ身体をぶつける音も、街の朝の雑音に紛れる程度でしかない。二人はそれぞれの死角へ折りたたまれ、機材も袋へ回収された。 Use the supplied character reference images to preserve these canonical looks: sato-jogging: サトー. Keep him as a mature 45-year-old Japanese man with long hair tied in a ponytail, mustache and chin beard, and a lean athletic build. In this novel he must always wear cool-weather jogging clothes, never denim or businesswear. sera-jogging: セラ. Keep her in a maid-inspired running outfit rather than an indoor maid dress, with silver-gray hair, golden eyes, black-and-white technical fabrics, and a clearly visible cat-ear headband support-security unit. Do not turn the outfit into armor or a generic tracksuit. Focus characters: sera-jogging. Keep them clearly readable in the foreground or midground. Continuity notes: This is the Sera-side second section of the same apartment-intrusion incident as scene-003-002-001-sato. Keep the same apartment exterior relationship, same corridor or balcony line, and same late-morning spring light as the paired image. Sato must remain an unaware background figure preparing breakfast or cooling down, and must face away from the incident or look elsewhere. In every scene of this novel, Sato must keep his canonical face, long ponytail, mustache, chin beard, and lean 45-year-old build, while wearing early-April jogging wear suited to a cool Tokyo morning: a light running jacket or windbreaker, technical long-sleeve top, tapered running pants, and running shoes. In every scene of this novel, Sera must keep her canonical face, silver-gray hair, golden eyes, and cat ears while wearing a maid-inspired jogging outfit built from black-and-white performance fabrics, with apron-line design cues, a short pleated running skirt over leggings, a light jacket, running shoes, and a visible cat-ear headband support-security unit. For Sato-part images, Sato must be the dominant subject and Sera, if visible, must stay clearly separated from him by distance, never adjacent, never shoulder-to-shoulder, and never readable as a companion; she may be visible in the distance or on another part of the path, but not as an extremely tiny speck. For Sera-part images, Sera must be the dominant subject, actively stopping a separate attacker who clearly does not resemble Sato. In every Sera-part image, Sato must remain an unaware background figure, non-combatant, not helping, facing away from the action or looking elsewhere, and not looking toward Sera, the attacker, or the incident. Never let any attacker resemble Sato in face, hair, beard, age, clothing, build, or silhouette. All human figures must have normal anatomy with exactly two arms and two hands.  Create a restrained apartment-intrusion action image with Sera dominant as she stops a fake delivery operative with an unlock device and a rooftop support operative trying to reach Sato's balcony or door. Keep Sato smaller in the background, inside the apartment and unaware.
